codeReview.summary: The implementation successfully adds SEO metadata and a dynamic sitemap according to the feature requirements. Metadata includes the standard and Open Graph tags extracted from server-fetched content or falling back to a default SVG. The sitemap securely filters out draft and archived documents.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The public API lacks a GET /api/public/spaces endpoint. Because of this, sitemap.ts and doc-page-server-data.ts in the production Next.js app rely on importing allDocuments from @emerald/mocks to determine KNOWN_SPACES. This creates a coupling between production code and mock data for space discovery.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: In apps/docs/src/app/sitemap.ts: `import { allDocuments } from "@emerald/mocks"; const KNOWN_SPACES = Array.from(new Set(allDocuments.map((document) => document.space)));`

summary: Feature passed. Successfully implemented SEO metadata extraction and published-only sitemap generation.
